items.title: Index login and signup entry
items.scope: frontend — migrate index page (bTGYf/bTGbC) login/signup entry, hero, and auth CTAs that route into onboarding or authenticated SPA
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route `/` renders index layout preserving IR element tree from ir/slices/bTGbC____root.json with data-bubble-id on root regions
AC-2: Login and signup CTAs navigate to onboarding or post-auth dashboard per Bubble workflow parity
AC-3: Index page applies style_ref tokens from ir/slices/styles.json for hero, buttons, and typography
items.layout_notes: Preserve index hero group hierarchy from bTGbC____root slice; do not redesign marketing layout.

items.title: Password reset flow
items.scope: frontend — migrate reset_pw page (AAL/AAW) including email input, submit workflow, and success/error states
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route `/reset_pw` renders reset password form matching ir/slices/AAW____root.json hierarchy
AC-2: Submit triggers Supabase/auth reset equivalent to Bubble SignUp/reset workflow on page AAL
AC-3: Form fields carry data-bubble-id attributes for IR text inputs and buttons
items.layout_notes: Small page (~16 entities); single-column form layout from AAW____root.

items.title: Onboarding wizard shell and step routing
items.scope: frontend — migrate onboarding page (bTGNI/bTGNJ) wizard container, step progression driven by onboarding_step_os, and step transition workflows
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route `/onboarding` mounts wizard shell preserving bTGNJ____root.json top-level groups with data-bubble-id
AC-2: Step index/state maps to onboarding_step_os values (13 steps) with next/back consistent with Bubble custom states on bTGNI
AC-3: Step transitions fire the same logical branches as ir/slices/bTGNJ__workflows____part_A.json triggers
items.layout_notes: Wizard chrome and step router are distinct from question panels nested under bTGNP subtree.

items.title: Onboarding profile and role questions
items.scope: frontend — migrate onboarding question panels for customer pillar, role, orientation, and performance screens from bTGNJ element subtree
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Pillar and role selection UI renders options from customer_pillar_os and customer_role_os with IR-matched labels
AC-2: Question panels in bTGNJ__elements__bTGNP__elements____remaining_children.json preserve group hierarchy and style_ref
AC-3: Answers persist to onboarding store and advance wizard step when validation passes
items.layout_notes: Focus on bTGNP nested groups; reuse shared form primitives when MOD-DRSAM-DESIGN-SYSTEM lands.

items.title: Onboarding health and load signal capture
items.scope: frontend — migrate health flags, load signals, grief/recovery mode toggles, and related onboarding custom states on bTGNI
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Health flag and load signal groups from bTGNJ__elements____remaining_children.json render with correct multi-select behavior
AC-2: Custom states health_grief_mode_active_, health_recovery_mode_active_, load_signal_* map to frontend state flags
AC-3: Completing final onboarding step routes to dashboard (bTHDT) when all required signals captured
items.layout_notes: Health/load sections are dense; preserve repeating-group cell templates from IR slices.
